economic_notes: Kisemattawa Pimukamik Gas Bar is a consolidated band-owned enterprise. COVID-19 noted as potential economic risk. Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain assurance over existence and completeness of accounts payable and accrued liabilities. Auditor's report signed October 20, 2022 - over two years after fiscal year end. Prior year 2019 financials were also qualified by a different audit firm. Accounts payable of $24.3M is very large relative to revenue. CMHC Replacement Reserve has $957,787 unfunded balance due from operating fund. Construction in progress of $2,894,400 not included in tangible capital assets net book value shown. Total TCA including construction in progress would be $101,528,599. Six entities consolidated including Gas Bar. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text.
